content.content:
{"body":"This term has no enzyme xref:

id: GO:0045550
name: geranylgeranyl reductase activity
namespace: molecular_function
def: "Catalysis of the formation of phytyl group from the stepwise reduction of a geranylgeranyl group." [PMID:9492312]
is_a: GO:0016491 ! oxidoreductase activity

PMID:9492312 abstract says:
"Geranylgeranyl reductase expressed in Escherichia coli sequentially catalyzes the reduction of geranylgeranyl-chlorophyll a into phytyl-chlorophyll a as well as the reduction of free geranylgeranyl diphosphate into phytyl diphosphate."

Both these reactions are covered by EC:1.3.1.83, whose entry says:
Reaction catalysed: phytyl diphosphate + 3 NADP(+) = geranylgeranyl diphosphate + 3 NADPH + 3 H(+)
Comments: This enzyme also acts on geranylgeranyl-chlorophyll a.

This is consistent with the MetaCyc entry for this gene (also attributed to PMID:9492312): https://metacyc.org/gene?orgid=META&id=AT1G74470-MONOMER#REFS

So:
- [ ] GO:0045550 should be obsoleted and replaced with GO:0102067:

id: GO:0102067
name: geranylgeranyl diphosphate reductase activity
namespace: molecular_function
def: "Catalysis of the reaction: (E)-3,7,11,15-tetramethylhexadec-2-en-1-yl diphosphate + 3 NADP = 2-trans,6-trans,10-trans-geranylgeranyl diphosphate + 3 NADPH + 3 H+." [EC:1.3.1.83, GOC:pz]
xref: EC:1.3.1.83 {source="skos:exactMatch"}
xref: MetaCyc:RXN-10625
xref: RHEA:26229 {source="skos:exactMatch"}
is_a: GO:0016628 ! oxidoreductase activity, acting on the CH-CH group of donors, NAD or NADP as acceptor
property_value: term_tracker_item "https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/30193" xsd:anyURI


There are only 3 annotations to GO:0045550 geranylgeranyl reductase activity:
- human [AKR1C3](https://amigo.geneontology.org/amigo/gene_product/UniProtKB:P42330) by UP
- human [AKR1B10](https://amigo.geneontology.org/amigo/gene_product/UniProtKB:O60218) by UP
- Arabidopsis [CHLP](https://amigo.geneontology.org/amigo/gene_product/AGI_LocusCode:AT1G74470) by TIGR

Also:
- [ ] Update def of GO:0102067 to match EC/RHEA: phytyl diphosphate + 3 NADP+ = geranylgeranyl diphosphate + 3 NADPH + 3 H+
- [ ] Add sentence to GO:0102067 definition to say "also catalyzes the the reduction of geranylgeranyl-chlorophyll a into phytyl-chlorophyll a"

content.text:
Base directory for this skill: /__w/go-ontology/go-ontology/.claude/skills/reaction

Reaction terms may have mappings that are qualified using skos (using `source` qualifiers), as in the following:

```
[Term]
id: GO:0000140
name: acylglycerone-phosphate reductase (NADP+) activity
namespace: molecular_function
def: "Catalysis of the reaction: 1-hexadecanoyl-sn-glycero-3-phosphate + NADP+ = 1-hexadecanoylglycerone 3-phosphate + H+ + NADPH." [RHEA:17341]
synonym: "1-acyldihydroxyacetone-phosphate reductase activity" EXACT []
synonym: "1-palmitoylglycerol-3-phosphate:NADP+ oxidoreductase activity" RELATED [EC:1.1.1.101]
synonym: "acyldihydroxyacetone phosphate reductase activity" RELATED [EC:1.1.1.101]
synonym: "palmitoyl dihydroxyacetone phosphate reductase activity" RELATED [EC:1.1.1.101]
synonym: "palmitoyl-dihydroxyacetone-phosphate reductase activity" RELATED [EC:1.1.1.101]
synonym: "palmitoyldihydroxyacetone-phosphate reductase activity" RELATED [EC:1.1.1.101]
xref: EC:1.1.1.101 {source="skos:exactMatch"}
xref: MetaCyc:ACYLGLYCERONE-PHOSPHATE-REDUCTASE-RXN {source="skos:exactMatch"}
xref: MetaCyc:RXN-15046 {source="skos:narrowMatch"}
xref: RHEA:17341 {source="skos:exactMatch"}
xref: RHEA:36175 {source="skos:narrowMatch"}
is_a: GO:0016616 ! oxidoreductase activity, acting on the CH-OH group of donors, NAD or NADP as acceptor
property_value: term_tracker_item "https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/28070" xsd:anyURI
property_value: term_tracker_item "https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/issues/28526" xsd:anyURI
```

Ideally there is a single source of truth for a reaction terms, which should be specified in the def xref
Now let me update the definition.

input.new_string: def: "Catalysis of the reaction: phytyl diphosphate + 3 NADP+ = geranylgeranyl diphosphate + 3 NADPH + 3 H+. This enzyme also catalyzes the reduction of geranylgeranyl-chlorophyll a into phytyl-chlorophyll a." [EC:1.3.1.83, PMID:9492312, RHEA:26229]

- Reaction simplified to use 'phytyl diphosphate' and 'geranylgeranyl
  diphosphate' (matching EC:1.3.1.83 / RHEA:26229 wording)

- Added sentence noting that this enzyme also catalyzes the reduction

- Definition references updated to EC:1.3.1.83, PMID:9492312, RHEA:26229

Obsoletion of GO:0045550 to be handled in a separate ticket.

input.command:
gh pr create --title "Update GO:0102067 definition per sjm41 comments (refs #31963)" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

Updates the definition of GO:0102067 (geranylgeranyl diphosphate reductase activity) per @sjm41's comments on issue #31963.

### Changes

- Reaction in def simplified to use `phytyl diphosphate` and `geranylgeranyl diphosphate` (matching the EC:1.3.1.83 / RHEA:26229 canonical wording) instead of the more cumbersome systematic IUPAC names previously used.
- `NADP` corrected to `NADP+`.
- Added a sentence noting that the enzyme also catalyzes the reduction of geranylgeranyl-chlorophyll a into phytyl-chlorophyll a, per PMID:9492312.
- Definition xrefs updated from `[EC:1.3.1.83, GOC:pz]` to `[EC:1.3.1.83, PMID:9492312, RHEA:26229]`.

Per requester instructions, the obsoletion of GO:0045550 (which would be replaced by this term) is **not** included in this PR; it will be handled separately. Issue #31963 is intentionally left open.

### Diff

Before:
```
def: "Catalysis of the reaction: (E)-3,7,11,15-tetramethylhexadec-2-en-1-yl diphosphate + 3 NADP = 2-trans,6-trans,10-trans-geranylgeranyl diphosphate + 3 NADPH + 3 H+." [EC:1.3.1.83, GOC:pz]
```

After:
```
def: "Catalysis of the reaction: phytyl diphosphate + 3 NADP+ = geranylgeranyl diphosphate + 3 NADPH + 3 H+. This enzyme also catalyzes the reduction of geranylgeranyl-chlorophyll a into phytyl-chlorophyll a." [EC:1.3.1.83, PMID:9492312, RHEA:26229]
```

## Checklist

- [x] PLAN: Issue and context analyzed; intent is clear
- [x] PRE-VALIDATION: Ontology validated cleanly before changes (`make travis_build` passed)
- [N/A] RESEARCH: Not required — change is driven directly by EC:1.3.1.83 / RHEA:26229 / PMID:9492312 cited in the issue
- [x] TERM-SEARCH: Existing term GO:0102067 located and inspected via `obo-grep.pl`
- [N/A] DESIGN-PATTERNS: No structural changes (no new logical def, no new relationships); reaction term metadata pattern already in place
- [x] EDITS: Used `obo-checkout.pl` / edit in `terms/` / `obo-checkin.pl`
- [x] RELATIONSHIPS: Unchanged — `is_a: GO:0016628` retained; no logical def added (would be over-specification for a non-compositional EC term)
- SPECIALIZED-EDITS:
  - [N/A] /term-obsoletion — obsoletion of GO:0045550 explicitly deferred per requester
  - [N/A] /chemical-entity — no CHEBI references touched
  - [x] /reaction — consulted; def now anchored to EC + RHEA
  - [N/A] /taxon-constraint
- [x] METADATA: No `created_by`/`creation_date` added (existing term, edit only). Existing `term_tracker_item` for #30193 retained.
- [x] AUTOMATED-VALIDATION: `cd src/ontology && make travis_build` passed (all SPARQL-QC and reasoning checks)
- [x] REFERENCE-VALIDATION: PMID:9492312 is the same reference cited in the issue body for the chlorophyll-a reductase activity; EC:1.3.1.83 and RHEA:26229 already xref'd on this term.
- [x] CHANGES-COMMITTED
  - [x] Only `src/ontology/go-edit.obo` modified
  - [x] Biologically accurate (matches EC:1.3.1.83 entry and PMID:9492312 abstract)
  - [x] Aligned with the requester's scoped ask (definition-only update; no obsoletion)
  - [x] Comment posted to #31963
  - [x] Detailed PR description (this)

---
🤖 **Generated by @dragon-ai-agent**
- Model: \`claude-opus-4-7\`
- Agent harness: claude-code
- Triggered by: @raymond91125
- Run: [View workflow run](https://github.com/geneontology/go-ontology/actions/runs/25065339565)
EOF
)"

- `NADP` corrected to `NADP+`.
- Added a sentence noting that the enzyme also catalyzes the reduction of geranylgeranyl-chlorophyll a into phytyl-chlorophyll a (per PMID:9492312).
